rationale: Educ. Code §45.063 merely authorizes the board to adopt rules for the bond guarantee program. It contains no homestead exemption thresholds or revenue-dependent triggers that the proposed Tax Code §11.13(b) increase would alter.
quote: The board may adopt rules necessary for the administration of the bond guarantee program.
_note: No direct or consequential conflict identified between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this rulemaking authority provision.
